## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional-commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing locally
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior changed (incl. docs/contracts.md if the
      inter-component contract moved)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md `Unreleased` entry for user-visible changes
- [ ] If substantially AI-generated: noted here, and personally reviewed,
      built and exercised per CONTRIBUTING.md
